name: Approach 01 – Building Custom Embedding Model
description: Builds a custom embedding model by fetching YouTube video transcripts and fine-tuning a SentenceTransformer base model.

options.name: paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2
options.description: Maps sentences & paragraphs to a 384-dimensional dense vector space. Multilingual.

options.name: all-MiniLM-L12-v2
options.description: Maps sentences & paragraphs to a 384-dimensional dense vector space.

options.name: all-mpnet-base-v1
options.description: Maps sentences & paragraphs to a 768-dimensional dense vector space.

fields.label: Distance Metric
fields.description: How similarity between your query and video content is measured. Each metric calculates 'distance' differently — lower distance means a closer match. IMPORTANT: each metric has a different score range, so the threshold must match the metric. The system applies sensible defaults automatically if your threshold is mis-scaled.

options.label: Manhattan (City Block) — Scores range 0–200+. Default threshold: 40. Best all-round choice.
Euclidean (Straight Line) — Scores range 0–50+. Default threshold: 8. Good for precise topic matching.
Chebyshev (Max Diff) — Scores range 0–2+. Default threshold: 0.8. Requires relevance across all aspects.
Minkowski (Generalised) — Scores range 0–200+. Default threshold: 40. Tuneable between Manhattan and Euclidean.
Standardised Euclidean — Scores range 0–50+. Default threshold: 8. Adjusts for feature variance.
Canberra — Scores range 0–384. Default threshold: 100. Sensitive to subtle differences.
Bray-Curtis — Scores range 0–1. Default threshold: 0.3. Good for proportional comparison.
Hamming — Scores range 0–1. Default threshold: 0.8. Counts differing dimensions.

fields.label: Distance Threshold
fields.description: Only videos scoring BELOW this number are returned. The right value depends on your distance metric: Manhattan uses 20–80, Euclidean uses 3–15, Bray-Curtis/Chebyshev use 0.1–0.8 (scores are 0–1). If you set a threshold that doesn't match your metric's scale, the system will automatically use a safe default. Tip: start with the metric's default and adjust up to see more results or down for stricter filtering.

fields.label: Max Results
fields.description: Maximum number of results per search. Even if many videos pass the threshold, only the closest N are shown. Set to 3 for focused answers, 10–15 for broader exploration.
